title: Ettupatti Rasa
desc: Singarasu's brave and helpful nature makes him the guardian of eight villages. However, his life takes an unfortunate turn when he puts his duty above all else.

title: Pattalam
desc: Major Pattabhiraman leads a military unit with his second-in-command Benny to a village, where they will find the loves of their lives amidst looming shadows of terrorism.

title: Agni Natchathiram
desc: Vishwanath has two sons, Gautam and Ashok, who are step-brothers and hate each other. But the two of them join hands in order to protect their father from a mafia.

title: Pangali
desc: Betrayed by his own kin, a man grows up in captivity, but with an ally's help, he escapes and fights to bring down those who destroyed his family.

title: Dharmapuri
desc: A rich landlord forces Sivaram's father, an honest hardworking man, to leave the village. However, years later, the villagers beg Sivaraman to save them from the cruel landlord and his sons.
